description: Perform a round-trip engineering workflow in MySQL Workbench to evolve the Sakila database schema for a customer loyalty tracking feature. The update requires adding a table named customer_tier_history with columns history_id (INT, Primary Key, Auto Increment, Not Null), customer_id (SMALLINT(5), Not Null), old_tier (VARCHAR(20)), new_tier (VARCHAR(20)), and change_date (DATETIME). Establish a 1:n non-identifying relationship from customer to customer_tier_history using customer_id as the foreign key. Save the resulting EER model to /home/ga/Documents/sakila_loyalty_model.mwb and apply the changes to the live 'sakila' database. Connection details: host: localhost, user: ga, password: password123.
